resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Discover the best locations in the city
Ask me anything about places to visit!
Hello! I\'m your personal guide. I can help you with location and event recommendations. How can I help you today?
I\'m having connection issues right now. I\'ll be back soon!
Are you sure you want to logout?
Start exploring and add places to your favorites!
Already have an account? Sign In
Please enter a valid email address
Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, number, and special character
Account created! Check your email for confirmation
Plan the perfect day with curated experiences and personalized recommendations
Sign in to see your profile
City landmarks face off! Vote today for +50 XP. Winners get 300 XP! 🚀
To resolve the error, add this SHA-1 fingerprint to Google Cloud Console for your Android client:\n\n
Name must be at least 2 characters
This email address is already registered
A confirmation link has been sent to:\n

Please check your inbox (and spam folder) to activate your CityScape account.

The link expires in 24 hours.
has not yet been confirmed.\n\nPlease check your Inbox for the activation link sent by CityScape.
Please choose at least one interest, or click Skip!
Location not available yet. Please wait.
Location not available yet. Trying to find it...
Offline Mode: Loading saved pins from memory 📴
No planned activities for this day.
No active groups to send the story to.
No new activities found in calendar for the next 30 days.
Could not generate report. Try again later.
Story sent to group chat! 🚀 +200 XP
Saved offline successfully! 🔌 Will sync with server when you\'re back online.
Analyzing weather forecast in real time... ☁️
XP and badge added to profile! 🚀
AI Chronicle has a creative block right now.
Group not found. Check the code!
Audio guide reads with accent because Romanian is missing from your phone\'s Text-to-speech settings. You can install the Romanian language package from Android settings (Text-to-speech).
GPS not responding. Set a city in Settings or enable location.
Audio guide reads with accent because Romanian is missing from your phone Text-to-speech settings. You can install the Romanian package from Android settings (Text-to-speech).
XP and badge added to profile! 🚀
Analyzing weather forecast in real time... ☁️

Congratulations! You discovered the hidden secret in the CityScape app code!

🎒 You received +1000 XP for academic excellence and the elite badge 'Grade 10 License'! 🏆

Maximum success for your thesis presentation!
Compiling your adventures into a mystic manuscript...
How do you want to share?
How was your visit here? Help your friends with a recommendation!
Create a group or invite a single friend after checking availability.
Do you want to export all %d activities to your phone\'s calendar?
I\'ve opened the export for your activities!
How do you want to invite?
Offline Mode Active. 🔌 Even without internet, you can access your saved offline routes from your profile and make GPS check-ins at visited locations!
Enter the name of the city you want to explore:
GPS not responding. Set a city in Settings or enable location.
Choose an indoor alternative below to view and plan:
How was the activity? Your feedback helps us offer you better plans!
Congratulations! You reached %1$s (%2$s) and completed the proximity quest!\n\n🎒 You received +200 XP and the Master Explorer badge! 🏆
Audio guide reads with accent because Romanian is missing from your phone\'s Text-to-speech settings. You can install the Romanian package from Android settings (Text-to-speech).
Don\'t forget to make a table reservation.
Choose a category and click on the globe
\\"An excellent choice to relax and discover the local charm!\\"
✨ Explore the surroundings at your own pace.\n ✨ Admire the architectural details and charm of the place.
Many active visitors at the moment
This location is recommended for its unique experience...
This is a real event taken from our network. Join to experience the unique atmosphere and meet new people passionate about the same interests.
Don\'t have an account? Sign up
Suggest locations and vote for the best one!
No proposal yet. Be the first!
Enter your desired destination or select a popular one:
Choose your favorite categories to give you personalized recommendations when you explore!
Even if you\'re on a plane, on the subway, or without a signal, CityScape continues to work and show you the latest recommendations explored!
Visit 2 cafes and post a mystical picture.
Because it\'s sunny, it\'s the perfect time!
Discover the iconic places and vibe of the city
Already have an account? SIGN IN
The plan is ready. Click below to open it on the map!
Where do you want to explore today?
What do you really want us to do?
You have invitations from friends! Accept to join their groups.
Plan this activity with your friends and collect XP together!
Search for friends by email or @user
🎯 Why did I recommend this to you?
Matches your interests • You have not visited yet
The Social Pulse of the City
This location has seen a massive increase in popularity due to positive reviews in the last 24 hours.
Ex: Buy a ticket ahead of time, take pictures at sunset...
Congratulations! You\'ve reached your destination and unlocked your reward!
Set when you are available for this activity
No one has set their schedule yet
You still need 550 XP for the next level
Welcome back! Please enter your details.
Enter the code received from your friend to join the group
This is a review about a place...
Generate the perfect day in seconds
WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE TO DO TODAY?
You don\'t have any adventures saved yet
Start by choosing a theme above and let the AI ​​surprise you!
Exceptional location, impeccable service and intimate atmosphere.
Create a group from an activity or enter with a code
Discover hidden places and unique experiences.
Enter your preferred city or choose a popular one:

Privacy Policy - CityScape AI

1. Data Collection: We collect history of visited locations and your interests to offer a personalized experience.
2. AI Transparency: Every recommendation generated by AI explains to you in percentage why it was chosen based on your data.
3. We do not sell data: Your profile is processed exclusively for CityScape features.

Guaranteed security.

Terms and Conditions - CityScape

1. By using the application, you agree to respect the community rules.
2. Your data (name, preferences) are used exclusively for personalizing recommendations via AI.
3. We do not store passwords in plain text, and authentication is secured via Supabase.
4. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that spam in the 'Hype Battle' module.

Last update: Today.
Password must be at least 8 characters long
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
Password must contain at least one digit
It is raining outside, but it\'s the perfect time for your passion! 🌧️ We suggest a cultural visit to the National Museum of Art of Romania or the National History Museum.
Heavy rain! 🌧️ Take shelter in a warm specialty cafe downtown or enjoy a delicious lunch at a cozy restaurant.
It\'s rainy weather! 🌧️ Sounds like a perfect day for shopping in one of the city\'s large covered malls.
It is rainy in the city right now! 🌧️ Our recommendation is an indoor cultural activity. How about an exhibition or a quiet cafe?
It is cold outside (%s)! ❄️ A hot chocolate or aromatic tea at a chic teahouse will warm you up immediately.
It is cool outside (%s)! ❄️ We suggest you take shelter in a warm art gallery or museum.
The evening is cold (%s)! ❄️ The fun moves indoors in a welcoming pub or a club full of energy.
It is quite cool outside (%s)! ❄️ We recommend exploring warm indoor spaces. An exhibition or a warm drink would be ideal.
Perfect weather for nature (%s)! 🌤️ The Botanical Garden or Herăstrău Park awaits you for a refreshing walk.
Excellent weather for an urban walk (%s)! 🌤️ Pay a visit to Calea Victoriei and enter the Museum of Art Collections.
Pleasant weather in the city (%s)! 🌤️ Savor a delicious brunch at a cozy outdoor terrace downtown.
Excellent weather for an urban walk (%s)! 🌤️ A visit to the Botanical Garden or a walk on Calea Victoriei would be a perfect experience.
A warm and sunny day (%s)! ☀️ Cișmigiu or Herăstrău Park are the ideal places. Try a boat ride!
Very hot day in the city (%s)! ☀️ Cool off with a cold lemonade on a shaded terrace in the Old Town.
Perfect summer evening (%s)! ☀️ Going out to an open terrace or a rooftop bar is the ideal choice.
It is a warm and sunny day (%s)! ☀️ Perfect for a terrace or relaxation in the park. We recommend Herăstrău Park or a walk on the lake!
This location is recommended for its unique experience and excellent reviews.
👉 Download CityScape, go to Calendar and enter the code!
I\'ll be there right on time! See you there.
Awesome! Let\'s not forget to take photos! 📸
Let\'s gather in front of the main entrance.
Agreed! Do you want to stop for a coffee before? ☕

⚠️ User '%s' was not found locally.
The invitation will be sent via group code.
🔴 There is no common free slot in the chosen interval.\nTry a wider interval.

Best common slot: %1$s
Do you want to send an invitation to %2$s?
CityScape AI: 🧠 Analyzing member profiles and combined interests to find the best recommendations... Please wait.
